case_title: IAN W ATHA VS. KARTIK BHARATH

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-30-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF IAN W. ATHA.
